title: Muslin Cloths for Baby 10 Pack Baby Muslin Squares Super Soft and Absorbent Muslin Face Clothss 100% Cotton 35x50cm by YOOFOSS - White
features: ❤Pure Muslin Cotton: Made of natural 100% muslin cotton, our muslin cloths for baby is super soft and extra comfortable to touch. The fabric is pre-washed which helps making the muslin sqaures softer and less shrinkage.

❤Soft and Safety: Odorless and natural. These reusable muslin cloths are suitable against your baby's delicate skin, even after repeated washings. To guarantee baby's healthy, you can put our baby muslins in 90℃ water for disinfecting after a period of use.

❤Excellent Abosrbency: 4 Layer construction offering enough absorbency while using as both baby muslin cloths or burp cloths. Muslin is much quicker drying than normal cotton even comes with such thickness.

❤Multi-Function: Each muslin face cloths measures the stretched size is 30x50cm, can be used for both baby and adult, such as baby muslin squares, baby bath towels, baby wash cloths, face towels, remove make up, milk towels, dinner cloth, hand towels, baby wipes,etc.

❤Perfect Choice: As a parent, caring for a newborn is both exciting and challenging. This is a practical and safe muslin cloths. It can be your right-hand man in caring for baby, providing you and your baby with a safe and comfortable growth environment.
